name: slowdecay090_steps500
hypothesis: exp006's surprise (divergence is slow state accumulation independent of LR) points at decay dynamics as the prime suspect; forgetting HARDER via slow_decay 0.97->0.90 bounds the slow-track state more aggressively, which should restore stability (kill the late divergence seen at slow_decay 0.97) AND test whether stale state interferes with retrieval — if a cleaner-forgetting state lifts tokacc past 0.30 it's both a beat and a mechanism diagnosis.
